name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M45653 Cream Print 】M14403 This OnTheGo small handbag renews the brand's classic Monogram Empreinte leather, outlining the pattern in matching tones. Detachable metal chain accents add a touch of detail, while striped fabric lining exudes elegance, and a detachable shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody carrying. 19 x 11.5 x 25 cm (H x W x L)
